What this file is
This is an inspectable HTML/CSS reconstruction of the generated mockup, not an automatic source extraction from the PNG. It is designed to be more useful for engineering guidance because the layout, tokens, and components are real DOM and CSS.
Design tokens 
{
  "colors": {
    "surface": "#ffffff",
    "surfaceSoft": "#f7f9fc",
    "line": "#d7dee8",
    "text": "#1f3447",
    "textMuted": "#5d7085",
    "primary": "#1e73d9",
    "primaryStrong": "#105ec0",
    "accentRed": "#e25b4c",
    "accentAmber": "#e39b3d",
    "accentGreen": "#3ba786"
  },
  "radius": {
    "shell": 18,
    "xl": 16,
    "lg": 12,
    "md": 10,
    "sm": 8
  },
  "layout": {
    "topbarHeight": 74,
    "sidebarWidth": 420,
    "contentGap": 20,
    "mainPadding": 28
  }
}
Layout notes for Codex
  • App shell is a single glassmorphism-style window over a scenic background.
  • Topbar uses a three-zone layout: nav, goal chip, actions.
  • Main content is a two-column grid: left focus/work area, right AI/recommendation rail.
  • Primary content rhythm is card-stack based with 14px to 22px vertical spacing.
  • Buttons are consistently rounded, compact, and visually elevated.
Reference image
